query: List the five 1 km grid cells in Lillestrøm municipality with the highest number of parcels located in quick-clay hazard areas, sorted by parcel count descending.

1.description: Fetch Lillestrøm municipality boundary to use as spatial filter

2.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard areas intersecting Lillestrøm municipality

3.description: Fetch all parcels in Lillestrøm municipality (kommunenummer = '3205')

4.description: Identify parcels located within quick-clay hazard areas

5.description: Fetch 1 km grid cells intersecting Lillestrøm municipality

6.description: Identify which parcels in quick-clay hazard areas fall within each 1 km grid cell

7.description: Count parcels per 1 km grid cell

8.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending

9.description: Limit results to top 5 grid cells

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[11.05,59.95],[11.05,60.05],[11.15,60.05],[11.15,59.95],[11.05,59.95]]]]}'), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[11.05,59.95],[11.05,60.05],[11.15,60.05],[11.15,59.95],[11.05,59.95]]]]}'), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 5
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["geom_geojson"]
-- metric_as: "parcel_count"
